build: pnpm build — SUCCESS, all routes compiled

items.desc: Destructive badge: soft red — bg-red-100/text-red-700 light, dark:bg-red-900/30
kubeconfig icon → mdi:file-cog-outline gray; minikube stays K8s blue
FilterBar skips empty selects; dashboard omits environment from FilterBar (tab buttons handle it)
Sidebar nav: text-secondary (higher contrast), accent/10 active bg, accent/5 hover
Total Nodes → Server icon; Warning Events → Bell when count=0, AlertTriangle only when >0
Stat card borders: border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 (replaces invisible glass-border)
Stat cards: grid-cols-4 pure Tailwind, removed inline style override, w-full on each card
Sidebar section headers: text-[11px] font-semibold text-secondary (was 10px muted)
PLATFORM text: text-secondary + font-medium (was text-muted, low contrast)
